nodes.id: Customer Success Manager and Logistics Manager
nodes.name: Customer Success Manager and Logistics Manager

nodes.product_name: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging Port

nodes.name: Reorder Level
nodes.formula: Set per SKU per branch based on lead time, sales velocity, and safety stock

nodes.name: Severity 1
nodes.communication_requirement: No proactive communication unless customer inquires

nodes.name: Severity 2
nodes.communication_requirement: Escalation ticket created; optional customer update

nodes.name: Stockout Risk
nodes.formula: stock_units <= reorder_level OR projected demand exceeds supply before lead time ends

edges.target: Customer Success Manager and Logistics Manager
